other_observers: Bill Kaempfer and Christian Nunes.; Found by Alex Brown at Baseline Res; also seen by Maggie Boswell at Valmont.
specific_location: The northern lake at the Valmont Power Plant.
description: A very large bird; intermediate in size between a White Pelican and Double-crested Cormorant, that were sitting next it. Huge bill with a large pouch. Upperparts a uniform dark brown, including the wings. Dark eye. White lower chest and belly. Flew with the slow flaps and labored flight of a Pelican.Behaviors: First seen flying over the water. Then standing on a sandbar, preening a little and resting. Finally, seen taking off and heafing east and then north.Call: NonePlumage: Juvenal
